differential_diagnoses: Occult gastrointestinal blood loss with iron deficiency anemia
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease or interstitial lung disease
Chronotropic incompetence related to beta-blocker therapy
next_steps: Complete blood count with ferritin and iron studies
Cardiac catheterization or coronary CT angiography
Transthoracic echocardiography to assess hemodynamics and valve severity
Cardiothoracic surgery or interventional cardiology consultation for TAVR evaluation
Pulmonary function tests with diffusion capacity
